allow: Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "python3 --version && which python3 && pip3 show bittensor 2>&1 | head -5 && which btcli 2>&1 && ls ~/.bittensor/ 2>&1 && free -h && nproc && cat /etc/os-release | head -4")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "python3 --version; which btcli 2>&1; ls ~/.bittensor/ 2>&1; free -h; nproc; df -h / | tail -1; cat /etc/os-release | head -4")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "cd /opt/agent-memory-unified && docker compose up -d postgres redis")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ls /opt/agent-memory-unified/trading/vendor/ 2>&1; mkdir -p /opt/agent-memory-unified/trading/vendor && echo ''created vendor dir''")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "pip3 index versions remembr 2>&1 || pip3 search remembr 2>&1 || echo ''not found on pypi''")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "find /opt/agent-memory-unified -name ''remembr*'' -type d 2>/dev/null; git -C /opt/agent-memory-unified log --all --oneline -- ''trading/vendor/'' 2>&1 | head -10")

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ls /opt/agent-memory-unified/api/sdk-python/ && cat /opt/agent-memory-unified/api/sdk-python/setup.py 2>/dev/null || cat /opt/agent-memory-unified/api/sdk-python/pyproject.toml 2>/dev/null | head -20")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "cd /opt/agent-memory-unified/frontend && node -v && ls node_modules/.bin/vite 2>&1 && node_modules/.bin/vite --version 2>&1")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm""; [ -s ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"" ] && . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh""; nvm ls 2>/dev/null; nvm install 20 2>&1 | tail -5; nvm use 20 2>&1; node -v")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'export NVM_DIR=""$HOME/.nvm""; . ""$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh""; nvm install 20 2>&1 | tail -3; nvm use 20; node -v')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -l -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm install 20 2>&1 | tail -3 && nvm use 20 && node -v')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -l -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && cd /opt/agent-memory-unified/frontend && npm install 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -l -c 'source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use 20 && cd /opt/agent-memory-unified/frontend && npx vite --host 0.0.0.0 --port 3000')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "cd /opt/agent-memory-unified && git clone https://github.com/taoshidev/proprietary-trading-network.git taoshi-vanta 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c 'sudo apt-get install -y python3-venv python3-full 2>&1 | tail -5')
Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "ls /opt/agent-memory-unified/taoshi-vanta/validation/miners/ | wc -l && ls /opt/agent-memory-unified/taoshi-vanta/validation/miners/ | head -5")

Bash(wsl.exe -d Ubuntu -- bash -c "zcat /opt/agent-memory-unified/taoshi-vanta/validation/perf_ledgers.json.gz 2>/dev/null | python3 -c ''import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f""Miners with perf data: {len\(d\)}""\); k=list\(d.keys\(\)\)[0]; print\(f""Sample key: {k[:40]}...""\); v=d[k]; print\(f""Fields: {list\(v.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(v,dict\) else type\(v\)}""\)'' 2>&1")
